Blob Storage

Blob Storage

Overview

Blob storage manages binary files (images, videos, etc.) associated with records. Blobs are content-addressed using CIDs and stored separately from records.

Blob Lifecycle

1. Upload
   ├─ Receive binary data
   ├─ Generate CID
   ├─ Store in blob storage
   └─ Return CID to client

2. Reference
   ├─ Include CID in record
   ├─ Store record
   └─ Link blob to record

3. Retrieval
   ├─ Get record
   ├─ Extract blob CID
   ├─ Retrieve blob by CID
   └─ Return to client

4. Deletion
   ├─ Delete record
   ├─ Check if blob referenced elsewhere
   ├─ If not referenced, delete blob
   └─ Free storage

Blob Storage Backend

@protocol BlobStorage <NSObject>

// Storage operations
- (BOOL)storeBlob:(NSData *)data forCID:(NSString *)cid error:(NSError **)error;
- (nullable NSData *)getBlob:(NSString *)cid error:(NSError **)error;
- (BOOL)deleteBlob:(NSString *)cid error:(NSError **)error;

// Metadata
- (nullable NSDictionary *)getBlobMetadata:(NSString *)cid error:(NSError **)error;
- (NSUInteger)getBlobSize:(NSString *)cid error:(NSError **)error;

// Listing
- (nullable NSArray *)listBlobs:(NSUInteger)limit offset:(NSUInteger)offset error:(NSError **)error;

@end

File-Based Storage

@interface FileBasedBlobStorage : NSObject <BlobStorage>

- (instancetype)initWithDirectory:(NSString *)directory;

@end

Directory Structure

${blobDirectory}/
├── ${cidPrefix2}/
│   ├── ${cidPrefix4}/
│   │   ├── ${cid}.blob
│   │   └── ${cid}.meta
│   └── ...
└── ...

Storing Blobs

// 1. Generate CID
NSData *blobData = /* image data */;
NSData *hash = [CryptoUtils sha256:blobData];
NSString *cid = [CID createCIDv1:hash codec:@"raw" error:&error];

// 2. Store blob
NSError *error = nil;
BOOL success = [blobStorage storeBlob:blobData forCID:cid error:&error];

if (success) {
    // 3. Store metadata
    NSDictionary *metadata = @{
        @"cid": cid,
        @"size": @(blobData.length),
        @"mimeType": @"image/jpeg",
        @"uploadedAt": [NSDate date]
    };

    [self storeMetadata:metadata forCID:cid];
}

Blob References

Blobs are referenced in records using embeds:

{
  "text": "Check out this image!",
  "embed": {
    "$type": "app.bsky.embed.image",
    "image": {
      "cid": "bafy2bzaced...",
      "mimeType": "image/jpeg",
      "size": 102400
    }
  }
}

Garbage Collection

Blobs without references are deleted:

// 1. Find unreferenced blobs
NSArray *allBlobs = [blobStorage listBlobs:UINT_MAX offset:0 error:&error];

for (NSDictionary *blob in allBlobs) {
    NSString *cid = blob[@"cid"];

    // 2. Check if referenced
    NSArray *references = [self findReferencesToBlob:cid];

    if (references.count == 0) {
        // 3. Delete unreferenced blob
        [blobStorage deleteBlob:cid error:&error];
    }
}

Blob Quotas

Users have storage quotas:

CREATE TABLE blob_quotas (
    did TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    quota_bytes INTEGER,
    used_bytes INTEGER,
    FOREIGN KEY (did) REFERENCES accounts(did)
);

Enforcing Quotas

// 1. Check quota
NSUInteger usedBytes = [self getUsedBlobStorage:userDid];
NSUInteger quotaBytes = [self getBlobQuota:userDid];

if (usedBytes + blobData.length > quotaBytes) {
    [XrpcErrorHelper setValidationError:response message:@"Blob quota exceeded"];
    return;
}

// 2. Store blob
[blobService uploadBlob:blobData forDid:userDid mimeType:mimeType error:&error];

// 3. Update usage
[self updateBlobUsage:userDid addBytes:blobData.length];

Blob Validation

MIME Type Validation

// 1. Check MIME type
NSString *mimeType = [self detectMimeType:blobData];

if (![self isAllowedMimeType:mimeType]) {
    [XrpcErrorHelper setValidationError:response message:@"MIME type not allowed"];
    return;
}

// 2. Validate magic bytes
if (![self validateMagicBytes:blobData forMimeType:mimeType]) {
    [XrpcErrorHelper setValidationError:response message:@"Invalid file format"];
    return;
}

Size Validation

// 1. Check size limits
NSUInteger maxSize = 5 * 1024 * 1024;  // 5MB

if (blobData.length > maxSize) {
    [XrpcErrorHelper setValidationError:response message:@"Blob too large"];
    return;
}

// 2. Check minimum size
if (blobData.length == 0) {
    [XrpcErrorHelper setValidationError:response message:@"Blob is empty"];
    return;
}

Best Practices

  1. Storage
  2. Use content addressing (CID)
  3. Deduplicate identical blobs
  4. Implement garbage collection

  5. Monitor storage usage

  6. Validation

  7. Validate MIME types
  8. Check magic bytes
  9. Enforce size limits

  10. Scan for malware

  11. Performance

  12. Use streaming for large blobs
  13. Cache frequently accessed blobs
  14. Implement CDN for distribution

  15. Monitor access patterns

  16. Security

  17. Validate file content
  18. Prevent path traversal
  19. Implement access controls
  20. Log blob operations

Common Patterns

Uploading a Blob

// 1. Receive blob
NSData *blobData = request.body;
NSString *mimeType = [request headerForName:@"Content-Type"];

// 2. Validate
if (blobData.length > 5*1024*1024) {
    [XrpcErrorHelper setValidationError:response message:@"Blob too large"];
    return;
}

// 3. Upload
NSError *error = nil;
NSDictionary *blob = [blobService uploadBlob:blobData
                                     forDid:userDid
                                   mimeType:mimeType
                                      error:&error];

if (!blob) {
    [XrpcErrorHelper setInternalServerError:response];
    return;
}

// 4. Return CID
response.statusCode = 200;
response.body = [NSJSONSerialization dataWithJSONObject:blob options:0 error:nil];

Creating a Post with Image

// 1. Upload image
NSDictionary *blob = [blobService uploadBlob:imageData
                                     forDid:userDid
                                   mimeType:@"image/jpeg"
                                      error:&error];

// 2. Create post with image embed
NSDictionary *post = @{
    @"text": @"Check out this image!",
    @"embed": @{
        @"$type": @"app.bsky.embed.image",
        @"image": @{
            @"cid": blob[@"cid"],
            @"mimeType": @"image/jpeg",
            @"size": blob[@"size"]
        }
    }
};

// 3. Store post
[recordService putRecord:@"app.bsky.feed.post"
                   rkey:@"abc123"
                  value:post
                 forDid:userDid
               actorDid:userDid
         validationMode:PDSValidationModeOptimistic
                  error:&error];
